---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Tincan
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What user-facing problem or threat does this address? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

What you would like to see. If it touches cryptography or the wire protocol,
describe the security reasoning.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches and why you prefer this one.

## Additional context

Links, prior art (Signal, Briar, Tox, Session, Nostr…), mockups, etc.
